title: Add a raw-categorical ordered CatBoost expert instead of more manual target encoding
summary: The dataset has high-cardinality categories like Driver and Driver-Race combinations.
rationale: The dataset has high-cardinality categories like Driver and Driver-Race combinations. CatBoost’s ordered target statistics and ordered boosting were designed specifically to reduce prediction shift from categorical leakage, which is exactly where the current pipeline is hand-engineered and fragile.
implementation_hint: Train one expert using raw string categorical columns and a few explicit crosses such as `Driver+Race`, `Driver+Compound`, `Race+Stint`, with CatBoost handling CTRs internally. Keep numeric race-state features, but remove most manual target encodings for this branch. Blend its OOF predictions with the existing XGBoost branch rather than replacing the whole stack.
expected_effect: Can recover signal from sparse drivers/races and unseen category combinations more cleanly than factorize-plus-TE, especially if current TE is slightly leaky or oversmoothed.
risk: Training can be slower and CatBoost GPU/CPU behavior differs; if categories are too noisy, the branch may only help as a small-weight ensemble member.
